headline: Pakistan Crypto Ban Looms Amid $100M Market Crunch

article.title: Pakistan crypto chief seeks dialogue after scholar rules against crypto payments
article.summary: Pakistan’s virtual-assets regulator called for continued dialogue on the treatment of digital assets after meeting an Islamic scholar who backed a ruling against purchases made with crypto.

headline: Ethereum Energy Use Plunges 99% Post Merge

article.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
article.summary: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the PoS networks studied.

headline: $5B Oil Shipments Disrupted Amid US-Iran Strikes

article.title: US, Iran Trade Wave of Strikes While Disputing Status of Hormuz
article.summary: The US struck Iran for a third time in a week, prompting retaliatory attacks on at least five Arab nations as Washington and Tehran issued conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz remains open to shipping.

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B National Trust Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

headline: Ethereum Layer-2 Robinhood Chain Launches $1B Tokenized Stocks

headline: Crypto ETFs See $282M Inflow, Break 8-Week Slump

article.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs snap eight-week outflow streaks with $282 million combined inflow
article.summary: The preceding eight weeks drained a combined $9.46 billion from the two groups, meaning this week’s rebound recovered only about 3% of those outflows.
